author: stefanbratanov
content: For Gloas, can we remove `ssz_static/ExecutionPayloadHeader` from the spec tests? We actually extend this container for Gloas to blind the envelopes internally in Teku, so we fail the ref tests, but in any case they are irrelevant since we no longer use the header after Gloas

author: jtraglia
content: Let me look into this. I suspect we can.
